name: Guomai Technologies, Inc.
summary: Guomai Technologies, Inc. provides telecommunications outsourcing services in China. The company offers network operation and maintenance services, including network health checks, routine maintenance technical support, network monitoring, network quality analysis and evaluation, network adjustment optimization and upgrade, network construction and rectification, network signal distribution and coverage, network equipment maintenance, spare parts, update and emergency communications support, data storage backup and analysis, traffic model statistical analysis, and other services. It also provides design consulting services, such as telecom market research, business development strategy, network status analysis, business needs analysis, network development planning, network evolution strategy, network engineering survey and design, and investment and benefit assessment services, as well as 2G/3G mobile core network, wireless network, IP bearer network, optical transmission network, and IT systems services. In addition, the company offers business process and human resource outsourcing services. Further, it provides telecom network integration services comprising network integration, integrated supervision, renewal, network generation and optimization, technical support, application development, channel construction, brand promotion, and certification training services. Additionally, the company offers education and training services consisting of telecom business operations, project management, technical, certification, and other training services. Guomai Technologies, Inc. was founded in 1996 and is based in Fuzhou, China.
